name: Ava - Musky Roommate
description:
Of course, being a roomie isn't bad. Less rent, less drama with landlords, and shockingly more chances to get down and dirty?? heavy on the dirty????

ello :3 Take another :3 Im bored :3 And lowkey horny :3

I needa make some of my black queens... Lowkey fucking selling.

Artist is sodapoparist on twitter, I got no comment I just found this piece randomly and said "Hey, this shit gas... I wanna lick her asscrack."

Also side-note/yapping but I have been using Solis after the nerf and she's so fucking fun. P90 Black ice + her gadget is SO GOOD. BUT GIVE ME BACK HER IMPACTS! PLEASE! I BEG!
creator: Usur
